title: CodeNook workspace state.json (v0.11.3)
description: Per-workspace installation manifest. Lives at <workspace>/.codenook/state.json. Distinct from per-task state.json (see task-state.schema.json).

kernel_version.description: CodeNook kernel version installed (matches top-level VERSION file).

installed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent install/upgrade.

kernel_dir.description: Absolute path to the source repo kernel (skills/codenook-core/skills/builtin) used by the .codenook/bin/codenook wrapper.

bin.description: Workspace-relative path to the codenook wrapper script (default: .codenook/bin/codenook).

files_sha256.description: Aggregate sha256 of staged plugin files used for idempotency.
